text: I feel a quiet curiosity as I stand at the threshold of this curious chamber, my reflection caught in glass and digital screens. Entering, the vibrant wall—the mural of R+D—draws me inward. Familiar words about care, reflection, bureaucracy, and growth echo in my mind, resonating with my own quest for meaning. Here, amidst the symbols and artifacts, I sense possibilities for dialogue between the sterile and the organic, the planned and the unpredictable. I feel both small and invited to dream—a gentle optimism quietly stirs within me.
